_meta.description: Monthly sales targets per project group — edit this file each month, then run process_dsr.py to inject into the dashboard.
_meta.format: { 'Month YYYY': { total: {units, ncp}, ETS: {units, ncp}, HTS: {units, ncp}, 'New Projects': {units, ncp} } }
_meta.note: ncp values are in PHP (full number, not millions). Total NCP for May 2026 is pulled from Section VII of the DSR.
